caption:
waking up to a symphony of birds surrounded by ancient forest this is not just a stay, it’s a deep breath for the soul ✨🏕️🌿🦚🐘✨ #srilanka @wildglampinggaloyabythema @themacollectionsrilanka @destination_srilanka 

📍this property lies on the fringes of the Gal Oya National Park one of Sri Lanka’s least-visited & most significant parks & a secluded sanctuary with rustic luxury surrounded by savannah & medicinal forest 

📣 #srilankaisopen back to normal after devastating flood & may you rise & shine bright 

🎞️ @dotzsoh @dotzsoh2 
#dotzsoh #wildglampinggaloya #withsrilanka #srilankaforallseasons #visitsrilanka
